system_description: Agency-operated records management system on-prem in agency data center. Processes PII for ~80,000 individuals and case files for agency adjudicatory proceedings.

information_types.name: Adjudicatory Case Files
information_types.rationale: Confidentiality: serious if disclosed (due process, privacy). Integrity: serious if modified (case outcomes). Availability: limited (manual workaround acceptable).

information_types.name: System logs and audit records
information_types.description: Audit events, access logs, system logs
information_types.rationale: All three: integrity required for forensic value, availability for incident response, confidentiality for PII embedded in logs.
